mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_training_plan_training_location WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{locationId} IS NULL or #{locationId} = '' THEN TO_CHAR(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(location_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text , 4, '0') ELSE #{locationId} END as location_id FROM esg.tb_training_plan_training_location WHERE location_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId} LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_training_location ( comp_id, location_id, location_nm, remark, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{locationId}, #{locationNm}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_training_plan_training_location SET location_nm = #{locationNm}, remark = #{remark}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = 'N' WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND location_id = #{locationId}
mapper.select:
WITH base_tpi AS ( SELECT * FROM esg.tb_training_plan_implementation WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{writeYear} ) SELECT base_tpi.*, ttpil.hr_id, thi.hr_nm, file.file_id as logo_id, toi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, thij.jbrp_nm, base_tpi.training_start || ' ~ ' || base_tpi.training_end AS training_period, ttpsc.courses_nm as trainingTypeNm, ttptc.center_nm as trainingInstituteNm, ttpinst.instructor_nm as trainingInstructorNm, ttptl.location_nm as trainingLocationNm, esg.fn_getapprovalstatus('TPI', base_tpi.write_year || base_tpi.doc_no) as approval_status, ttpih.doc_seq, ttpih.hr_id as id, ttpih.hr_nm as nm FROM base_tpi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses ttpsc ON ttpsc.comp_id = base_tpi.comp_id AND ttpsc.courses_id = base_tpi.training_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_center ttptc ON ttptc.comp_id = base_tpi.comp_id AND ttptc.center_id = base_tpi.training_institute LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_instructor ttpinst ON ttpinst.comp_id = base_tpi.comp_id AND ttpinst.instructor_id = base_tpi.training_instructor LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_location ttptl ON ttptl.comp_id = base_tpi.comp_id AND ttptl.location_id = base_tpi.training_location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_learner ttpil ON base_tpi.write_year = ttpil.write_year AND base_tpi.doc_no = ttpil.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON ttpil.hr_id = thi.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file file ON file.target_type = 'hrImg' AND file.target_id = thi.hr_id AND file.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp thij ON toi.comp_id = thij.comp_id AND thi.jbrp = thij.jbrp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_hr ttpih ON base_tpi.doc_no = ttpih.doc_no AND base_tpi.doc_type = ttpih.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_result_report ttrr ON base_tpi.write_year = ttrr.plan_write_year AND base_tpi.doc_type = ttrr.plan_doc_type AND base_tpi.doc_no = ttrr.plan_doc_no
-- 교육결과서가 없는 항목만 조회하도록 WHERE 1=1 AND( (ttrr.plan_write_year = #{writeYear} AND ttrr.use_yn = 'N') -- 데이터는 있지만 삭제되었을 경우 OR (ttrr.plan_write_year IS null AND base_tpi.training_date is not null) -- 불러오기 후 저장한 데이터이면서 교육결과서에 등록되지 않은 경우 )
ORDER BY base_tpi.use_yn DESC, base_tpi.doc_no DESC

SELECT ttpi.*, ttpil.hr_id, thi.hr_nm, file.file_id as logo_id, toi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, thij.jbrp_nm, ttpi.training_start || ' ~ ' || ttpi.training_end AS training_period, ttpsc.courses_nm as trainingTypeNm, ttptc.center_nm as trainingInstituteNm, ttpinst.instructor_nm as trainingInstructorNm, ttptl.location_nm as trainingLocationNm, esg.fn_getapprovalstatus('TPI', ttpi.write_year || ttpi.doc_no) as approval_status, ttpih.doc_seq, ttpih.hr_id as id, ttpih.hr_nm as nm FROM esg.tb_training_plan_implementation ttpi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses ttpsc ON ttpsc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpsc.courses_id = ttpi.training_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_center ttptc ON ttptc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptc.center_id = ttpi.training_institute LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_instructor ttpinst ON ttpinst.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpinst.instructor_id = ttpi.training_instructor LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_location ttptl ON ttptl.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptl.location_id = ttpi.training_location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_learner ttpil on ttpi.write_year = ttpil.write_year and ttpi.doc_no = ttpil.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON ttpil.hr_id = thi.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file file ON file.target_type = 'hrImg' AND file.target_id = thi.hr_id AND file.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp thij ON toi.comp_id = thij.comp_id AND thi.jbrp = thij.jbrp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_hr ttpih ON ttpi.doc_no = ttpih.doc_no AND ttpi.doc_type = ttpih.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_result_report ttrr ON ttpi.write_year = ttrr.plan_write_year AND ttpi.doc_type = ttrr.plan_doc_type AND ttpi.doc_no = ttrr.plan_doc_no WHERE ttpi.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttpi.write_year = #{writeYear} AND ttpi.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY ttpi.use_yn DESC, ttpi.doc_no DESC

SELECT ttpi.*, ttpil.hr_id, thi.hr_nm, toi.orgn_nm, thij.jbrp_nm, ttpi.training_start || ' ~ ' || ttpi.training_end AS training_period, ttpsc.courses_nm as trainingTypeNm, ttptc.center_nm as trainingInstituteNm, ttpinst.instructor_nm as trainingInstructorNm, ttptl.location_nm as trainingLocationNm, ttpih.doc_seq, ttpih.hr_id as id, ttpih.hr_nm as nm, thi.user_id, toi.orgn_nm, thij.jbrp_nm FROM esg.tb_training_plan_implementation ttpi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses ttpsc ON ttpsc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpsc.courses_id = ttpi.training_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_center ttptc ON ttptc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptc.center_id = ttpi.training_institute LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_instructor ttpinst ON ttpinst.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpinst.instructor_id = ttpi.training_instructor LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_location ttptl ON ttptl.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptl.location_id = ttpi.training_location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_learner ttpil on ttpi.write_year = ttpil.write_year and ttpi.doc_no = ttpil.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON ttpil.hr_id = thi.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp thij ON toi.comp_id = thij.comp_id AND thi.jbrp = thij.jbrp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_hr ttpih ON ttpi.doc_no = ttpih.doc_no AND ttpi.doc_type = ttpih.doc_type WHERE ttpi.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttpi.write_year = #{writeYear} AND ttpi.doc_no = #{docNo} AND ttpi.doc_type = #{docType}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_training_plan_implementation WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_implementation ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, title, training_date, training_start, training_end, training_type, budget, required_details, training_goal, expected_effect, materials_etc, materials, projector, vtr, training_content, training_institute, training_instructor, training_location, qna_yn, report_yn, delivery_training_yn, test_yn, effectiveness_etc, remark, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{title}, #{trainingDate}, #{trainingStart}, #{trainingEnd}, #{trainingType}, #{budget}, #{requiredDetails}, #{trainingGoal}, #{expectedEffect}, #{materialsEtc}, #{materials}, #{projector}, #{vtr}, #{trainingContent}, #{trainingInstitute}, #{trainingInstructor}, #{trainingLocation}, COALESCE(#{qnaYn}, 'N'), -- NULL이면 'N'으로 설정 COALESCE(#{reportYn}, 'N'), -- NULL이면 'N'으로 설정 COALESCE(#{deliveryTrainingYn}, 'N'), -- NULL이면 'N' COALESCE(#{testYn}, 'N'), -- NULL이면 'N' #{effectivenessEtc}, #{remark}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), -- NULL이면 'Y' 기본값 now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_hr WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_hr ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, hr_id, hr_nm, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{id}, #{nm}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_training_plan_implementation SET title = #{title}, training_date = #{trainingDate}, training_start = #{trainingStart}, training_end = #{trainingEnd}, training_type = #{trainingType}, budget = #{budget}, required_details = #{requiredDetails}, training_goal = #{trainingGoal}, expected_effect = #{expectedEffect}, materials_etc = #{materialsEtc}, materials = #{materials}, projector = #{projector}, vtr = #{vtr}, training_content = #{trainingContent}, training_institute = #{trainingInstitute}, training_instructor = #{trainingInstructor}, training_location = #{trainingLocation}, qna_yn = COALESCE(#{qnaYn}, 'N'), report_yn = COALESCE(#{reportYn}, 'N'), delivery_training_yn = COALESCE(#{deliveryTrainingYn}, 'N'), test_yn = COALESCE(#{testYn}, 'N'), effectiveness_etc = #{effectivenessEtc}, remark = #{remark}, use_yn = COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type = #{docType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_learner ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, hr_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{hrId}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
